changeSet.author: sumicare
sumicare
sumicare
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO package_tiers (package_id, service_id, weekday_price, weekend_price) SELECT p.id, s.id, 5000, 5000 FROM packages p JOIN services_catalogue s ON s.organization_id = p.organization_id WHERE p.code = 'PKG_VIP_MASSAGE' AND p.organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug='lasema') AND s.code IN ('FOOT_REFLEX','SHIATSU','SWEDISH','DEEP_TISSUE','LOMI_LOMI','LYMPHATIC','COMBINATION','SALT_GLOW_SCRUB','MILK_BATH_SCRUB','DAEMIDI','THAI','AROMA_REFLEX','VENTOSA','TANDEM');
INSERT INTO package_tiers (package_id, service_id, weekday_price, weekend_price) SELECT p.id, s.id, 6800, 6800 FROM packages p JOIN services_catalogue s ON s.organization_id = p.organization_id WHERE p.code = 'PKG_VIP_FULL' AND p.organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug='lasema') AND s.code IN ('FOOT_REFLEX','SHIATSU','SWEDISH','DEEP_TISSUE','LOMI_LOMI','LYMPHATIC','COMBINATION','SALT_GLOW_SCRUB','MILK_BATH_SCRUB','DAEMIDI','THAI','AROMA_REFLEX','VENTOSA','TANDEM');

changeSet.author: sumicare
